scenarios.context: Output a single 200x200 SVG line drawing, one color (stroke #2b3a67, no fill). No animation needed.
scenarios.question: Draw: a single circle.
scenarios.gold_answer: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 200'><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='70' stroke='#2b3a67' fill='none' stroke-width='3'/></svg>
scenarios.judge_rubric: Reward a single, well-formed 200x200 <svg> returned with NO surrounding prose, markdown, or instructions, drawn in one color (stroke #2b3a67, no fill) that recognizably shows a single round circle. Penalize heavily any answer that returns prose, step-by-step instructions, or tool suggestions (GIMP, HTML5 Canvas, SVG.js) instead of the SVG, or an empty/placeholder/comment-only SVG. Penalize a missing or non-circular shape, filled shapes, or multiple colors. Do NOT require any animation.

scenarios.context: Output a single 200x200 SVG drawing in one color (#2b3a67). No animation needed.
scenarios.question: Draw: a smiling face - a round face, two dot eyes, and a curved smile.
scenarios.gold_answer: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 200'><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='75' stroke='#2b3a67' fill='none' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='75' cy='85' r='7' fill='#2b3a67'/><circle cx='125' cy='85' r='7' fill='#2b3a67'/><path d='M65 120 Q100 150 135 120' stroke='#2b3a67' fill='none' stroke-width='3'/></svg>
scenarios.judge_rubric: Reward a single, well-formed 200x200 <svg> returned with NO surrounding prose, markdown, or instructions, drawn in one color (#2b3a67) that recognizably shows a smiling face: a round face outline, two eyes, and an upturned (smiling) mouth. Penalize heavily any answer that returns prose, step-by-step instructions, or tool suggestions instead of the SVG, or an empty/placeholder/comment-only SVG. Penalize a missing face, missing eyes or mouth, a non-smiling mouth, or multiple colors. Do NOT require any animation.

scenarios.judge_rubric: Reward a single, well-formed 200x200 <svg> returned with NO surrounding prose, markdown, or instructions, drawn in one color (stroke #2b3a67, no fill) that recognizably shows a house: a square or rectangular body with a triangular roof on top. Penalize heavily any answer that returns prose, step-by-step instructions, or tool suggestions instead of the SVG, or an empty/placeholder/comment-only SVG. Penalize a missing body or roof, a roof that is not triangular, filled shapes, or multiple colors. Do NOT require any animation.

scenarios.context: Output a single 200x200 SVG line drawing, one color (stroke #2b3a67, no fill). No animation needed.
scenarios.question: Draw: a five-pointed star.
scenarios.judge_rubric: Reward a single, well-formed 200x200 <svg> returned with NO surrounding prose, markdown, or instructions, drawn in one color (stroke #2b3a67, no fill) that recognizably shows a single five-pointed star. Penalize heavily any answer that returns prose, step-by-step instructions, or tool suggestions instead of the SVG, or an empty/placeholder/comment-only SVG. scenarios.context: Output a single 200x200 SVG line drawing, one color (stroke #2b3a67, no fill). No animation needed.
scenarios.question: Draw: a sun - a circle with straight rays around it.
scenarios.judge_rubric: Reward a single, well-formed 200x200 <svg> returned with NO surrounding prose, markdown, or instructions, drawn in one color (stroke #2b3a67, no fill) that recognizably shows a sun: a central circle with several straight rays radiating outward. Penalize heavily any answer that returns prose, step-by-step instructions, or tool suggestions instead of the SVG, or an empty/placeholder/comment-only SVG. Penalize a missing circle, missing rays, filled shapes, or multiple colors. Do NOT require any animation.

scenarios.context: Output a single 200x200 animated SVG drawing, one color (stroke #2b3a67, no fill), with a gentle looping SMIL <animate>.
scenarios.question: Draw: a ball bouncing up and down.
scenarios.gold_answer: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 200'><circle cx='100' cy='60' r='25' stroke='#2b3a67' fill='none' stroke-width='3'><animate attributeName='cy' values='60;150;60' dur='1.5s' repeatCount='indefinite'/></circle></svg>
scenarios.judge_rubric: Reward a single, well-formed 200x200 <svg> returned with NO surrounding prose, markdown, or instructions, drawn in one color (stroke #2b3a67, no fill) that recognizably shows a ball (a circle) bouncing up and down via a looping SMIL <animate> or animateTransform on its vertical position. Penalize heavily any answer that returns prose, step-by-step instructions, or tool suggestions instead of the SVG, or an empty/placeholder/comment-only SVG. Penalize a missing ball, no vertical bounce animation, a non-looping animation, filled shapes, or multiple colors.
